name: atlas-dropoff
description: See exactly where users drop off in your app — painted on your real screens. A tiny Expo/RN SDK + a report CLI, built on Revyl Atlas + PostHog.
author: Revyl (https://revyl.com)

scripts.demo:report: node packages/report/dist/cli.js generate --app cda16afc-2b9c-4042-a0c2-d863dc3c9ec6 --counts demo/crate-counts.json --screen-map demo/crate-screen-map.json --atlas-cache demo/.atlas-cache/crate --out demo/crate-report.html
